holdings.infoBox: MJSC is an equity ETF with a total of 99 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 8.12%, Fuji Corporation at 2.47%, Micronics Japan at 2.13%, Meiko Electronics at 2.01%, and Hachijuni Nagano Bank at 1.95%.

overview.description: The MUFG Japan Small Cap Active ETF (MJSC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term growth potential through economic cycles through investments in small-cap Japanese companies. The funds selection process employs a thematic approach that combines quantitative screens with proprietary supply chain analysis. MJSC was launched on Sep 17, 2025 and is issued by MUFG.
